pattern: Map letters to alphabet positions, concatenate as a number string, then iteratively collapse to its digit sum a fixed number of times.
hints: Each letter becomes its 1-based alphabet position; build the full numeric string first.
After forming the digit string, repeatedly replace the number with the sum of its digits.
You never need big-integer arithmetic: sum digit characters of the string, then keep summing the digits of the running total for the remaining rounds.

edge_inputs.description: many z's so the first sum is large
already single digit value after first round, extra rounds idempotent

stress.description: long random lowercase string with random round count
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100))
    s = ''.join(chr(rng.randrange(97, 123)) for _ in range(n))
    k = rng.randrange(1, 11)
    return [s, k]
